title: ODBC Configuration Utility
text: ODBC Configuration Utility Before you can use the ODBC Connector to make a connection to a data source, you must configure the assignment file with the specific settings appropriate for your data source. Uniface supplies configuration utilities named uodbccfg.exe (for version U4.0) and uodbccfg41.exe (for version U4.1) to ease the task of configuring the assignment files. The outward appearance of the utilities is the same and they work the same way. The configuration utility has the following functionality: Connects to an ODBC data source of your choice Detects data types available for that data source Detects connector settings for the data source Builds and displays an .asn fragment with the appropriate connector settings Displays the data types Allows you to save the connector settings and data type settings After you have finished using this utility, merge the assignment fragment into your assignment file and make any necessary changes to it. All ODBC connector options are described elsewhere in the ODBC connector documentation. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
